title: How should federation descriptors distinguish between capability exists in code and capability is active in production?
abstract: Analysis of: How should federation descriptors distinguish between capability exists in code and capability is active in production?. Faculties: agent_governance, agent_physics. Method: synthesis. 3 findings from 133 local + 8 federation sources.

findings.claim: Federation nodes with relevant capabilities identified

steward-federation: Federation nadi transport hub — shared state for steward agent mesh (matching: federation)
